backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor defining BlogPost types with comments, image storage, and contentImages array, providing CRUD operations for blog posts and comments with migration support.
backend/migration.mo: Migration module that transforms old BlogPost records without contentImages to new BlogPost records with an empty contentImages array.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting three features: fixing blog post display issues, adding inline image upload to the rich text editor, and restoring the green color scheme.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend files including routing, pages, components, hooks, and styling with details about typography, color schemes, and blog functionality.
frontend/index.css: Global CSS with Tailwind layers defining OKLCH color variables for light and dark modes using neutral grayscale values (no green theme applied yet).
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the AyurGlow Secrets React application with root div and module script reference.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with all routes (home, about, categories, subcategories, blog, admin, legal) and QueryClient provider.
frontend/src/components/BlogSidebar.tsx: Blog sidebar component with remedy search functionality, popular posts list, and category counts using cards and badges.
frontend/src/components/CommentSection.t: Displays and manages comments for a blog post, including a form to add new comments with author name and content. Fetches comments via useGetComments hook and submits new comments via useAddComment mutation.
frontend/src/components/FeaturedPost.tsx: Renders a large featured blog post card with image, title, excerpt, category badge, publish date, and read time. Links to the full post detail page using the post slug.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with four columns: about section with logo, quick links, category links, and newsletter signup with social media icons. Includes copyright and app identifier logic.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper component that renders Navigation, children content, and Footer in a flex column structure with cream background.
frontend/src/components/Navigation.tsx: Responsive navigation bar with logo, main nav links, categories dropdown, admin link, and mobile hamburger menu. Uses TanStack Router for navigation and highlights active routes.
frontend/src/components/PostCard.tsx: Displays a blog post as a card with image, category badge, title, excerpt, publish date, and read time. Links to the full post using the slug parameter.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: Search input component with icon, clear button, and keyboard navigation support (Enter, Escape, ArrowDown). Forwards ref to allow parent components to control focus.
frontend/src/components/SearchResults.ts: Dropdown search results list with keyboard navigation (arrow keys, Enter, Escape) and click handling. Displays matching posts with title, keywords, and category badge.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom React hook that manages the backend actor instance using React Query, creating authenticated or anonymous actors based on Internet Identity state and invalidating dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides Internet Identity authentication context and hooks for ICP, managing login/logout state, identity persistence, and delegation validation with configurable AuthClient options.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Defines React Query hooks for blog post CRUD operations (get all posts, get published posts, get single post, create, update, delete) using the backend actor with automatic cache invalidation.
frontend/src/hooks/useRemedySearch.ts: Custom hook providing search functionality for Ayurvedic remedy pages, filtering a predefined list of remedies by title, category, and keywords based on user query.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom green-themed color palette for light/dark modes, typography hierarchy using Inter and Playfair Display fonts, and responsive design utilities for an Ayurvedic wellness site.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React root with QueryClient and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the main App component.
frontend/src/pages/AboutPage.tsx: About page component displaying AyurGlow Secrets' mission, philosophy, and offerings with hero section and content cards using Ayurvedic-themed styling and icons.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPostsPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page for managing blog posts with list view, delete confirmation dialog, and navigation to create/edit post pages. Uses useGetAllPosts and useDeletePost hooks with loading and error states.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPage.tsx: Public blog listing page displaying published posts in a grid with sidebar. Uses useGetPublishedPosts hook and renders PostCard components with loading and empty states.
frontend/src/pages/BlogPostDetailPage.ts: Individual blog post detail page showing full post content with featured image, metadata, sidebar, and comment section. Fetches post by slug from useGetPublishedPosts hook.
frontend/src/pages/CreateBlogPostPage.ts: Form page for creating new blog posts with ReactQuill editor, image upload (featured and inline content images), category selection, and publish toggle. Uses useCreatePost hook and ExternalBlob for image handling.
frontend/src/pages/EditBlogPostPage.tsx: Form page for editing existing blog posts with pre-populated fields from useGetPost hook. Similar to CreateBlogPostPage with ReactQuill editor, image management, and useUpdatePost hook.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/DandruffSca: React page component displaying dandruff and scalp care remedies with hero section, back navigation, and cards showing natural treatments like neem-tea tree oil, lemon-yogurt mask, fenugreek-curd pack, and aloe vera-coconut oil soother.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/GreyHairSol: React page component for grey hair solutions featuring Ayurvedic remedies including curry leaves-coconut oil infusion, amla-henna pack, black tea-coffee rinse, and bhringraj-brahmi oil treatment with ingredients, application steps, and benefits.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/HairFallTre: React page component presenting hair fall treatments with natural remedies like onion juice treatment, fenugreek seeds mask, amla-shikakai pack, and curry leaves-coconut oil treatment, each with detailed application instructions and benefits.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/HairGrowthP: React page component showcasing hair growth remedies including castor oil-coconut oil blend, aloe vera-bhringraj mask, egg-yogurt protein treatment, and hibiscus-curry leaves pack with application methods and growth-promoting benefits.
frontend/src/pages/hair-care/OilsMasksPa: React page component displaying hair oils and masks treatments including Ayurvedic hot oil treatment, brahmi-amla oil, banana-avocado mask, hibiscus-fenugreek mask, and neem-tulsi scalp oil with detailed preparation and application steps.
frontend/src/pages/HairCarePage.tsx: Landing page for hair care category displaying subcategories (hair fall, growth, dandruff, grey hair, oils/masks) as clickable cards with icons and descriptions.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Diabe: React component displaying Ayurvedic remedies for diabetes and blood pressure management, including fenugreek water, bitter gourd juice, cinnamon-honey tonic, and garlic-lemon remedy with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency.

Alternative React component for diabetes and blood pressure support using Card UI components, featuring fenugreek seeds water, bitter gourd juice, cinnamon tea, and garlic-ginger remedy with preparation instructions and health benefits.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Diges: React page component for digestion and gut health remedies including Triphala churna, ginger-lemon tonic, ajwain water, and buttermilk with cumin, each with detailed preparation steps and Ayurvedic benefits.

Digestive health remedies page featuring Triphala powder, ginger-lemon tonic, CCF tea (cumin-coriander-fennel), and ajwain water with icons, ingredients, application instructions, and usage frequency for balancing digestive fire (Agni).
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Immun: React page component displaying immunity-boosting Ayurvedic remedies including Golden Turmeric Milk, Amla Juice, Tulsi Tea, and Chyawanprash with ingredients, preparation steps, benefits, and usage instructions.
Immunity-boosting remedies page showcasing turmeric golden milk, tulsi-ginger tea, Chyawanprash tonic, and amla-honey immunity shot with detailed preparation methods and immune system benefits.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Stres: React page component presenting stress relief and sleep remedies like Ashwagandha Moon Milk, Brahmi-Tulsi Tea, Chamomile-Lavender Blend, and Almond-Saffron Milk with detailed application instructions and benefits.

Alternative React page for stress and sleep solutions featuring similar remedies (Ashwagandha Moon Milk, Brahmi Tea, Chamomile-Lavender Infusion, Almond Milk with Saffron) with a hero section and back navigation to health remedies.
frontend/src/pages/health-remedies/Weigh: React page component showcasing weight management remedies including Lemon-Honey Water, Triphala-Guggul Formula, Ginger-Green Tea, and Cabbage-Carrot Detox Juice with metabolism-boosting benefits and frequency guidelines.
frontend/src/pages/HealthRemediesPage.ts: Landing page for Health Remedies category displaying five subcategories (Immunity, Digestion, Weight Management, Diabetes/BP, Stress/Sleep) in a grid with icons, descriptions, and navigation links.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Main homepage with hero banner, featured post section, recent posts grid, and category exploration section; fetches and displays published blog posts using React Query.
frontend/src/pages/PrivacyPolicyPage.tsx: Privacy policy page with sections covering introduction, information collection (automatic and user-provided), displayed in card components with back-to-home navigation.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AcnePimples: React page component for acne and pimple treatments featuring Neem-Turmeric Face Pack, Tea Tree Oil Spot Treatment, Sandalwood-Rose Water Paste, and Aloe Vera-Lemon Gel with application methods and skin benefits.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AcneTreatme: Displays four Ayurvedic acne treatment remedies (neem-turmeric, tea tree-aloe, sandalwood-rosewater, cinnamon-honey) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency for each remedy.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/AntiAgingPa: Presents four anti-aging remedies (almond-saffron serum, avocado-honey mask, rose water-glycerin tonic, papaya-yogurt mask) with detailed ingredients, application instructions, benefits, and recommended usage frequency.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/DIYFacePack: Lists five DIY face pack recipes categorized by skin type (multani mitti, besan-turmeric, oatmeal-honey, sandalwood-rose, banana-honey) with ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency recommendations.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/NaturalGlow: Showcases four natural glow remedies (turmeric-yogurt mask, saffron-milk treatment, aloe vera-rose water toner, papaya-honey mask) with ingredients, application methods, benefits, and usage frequency for radiant skin.
frontend/src/pages/skin-care/Pigmentatio: Features four remedies for treating pigmentation and dark spots (lemon-honey mask, potato-cucumber juice, almond-milk cream, orange peel-yogurt pack) with detailed ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency, plus a hero section with navigation.

React component displaying Ayurvedic remedies for pigmentation reduction with four natural treatments (lemon-honey, potato-cucumber, saffron-milk, orange peel masks), each showing ingredients, application steps, benefits, and frequency.
frontend/src/pages/SkinCarePage.tsx: Landing page for Skin Care category displaying five subcategories (Natural Glow, Acne, Pigmentation, Anti-Aging, DIY Face Packs) in a responsive grid with icons and navigation links.
frontend/src/pages/TermsOfServicePage.ts: Terms of service page with medical disclaimer alert and sections covering agreement to terms and website use, displayed in card components with back-to-home navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extensions including HSL-based color system, custom green color variants (earth-green, sage-green, etc.), typography settings with Inter and Playfair Display fonts, and animation utilities.
project_state.json: Project state file for AyurGlow Secrets blog website tracking three feature requests: fixing blog post display issues, adding image upload to rich text editor, and restoring green color theme.
